drafts.substack:
REGIME: Risk-on | Emerging
CONFIDENCE: Low (28/100)
RISK TILT: pro-risk
STABILITY: Fragile

Snapshot — Jun 04, 2026
  S&P 500:     7,550.29   z +1.36
  10Y Yield:      4.463%  z +0.82
  WTI Oil:        92.78   z -0.64

INSIGHT
S&P 500 at 7,550 is elevated relative to its rolling mean — starting to lean but not decisive. 10Y yield at 4.46% is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from yields. Oil at $93 is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from oil. Confidence is low at 28/100 — the read is fragile and needs more signal before acting on it.

INVALIDATION
• 10Y above 4.61% + SPX loses 7,475
• Oil above $102

Method: MacroEvidence pipeline · yfinance + FRED · 63-session rolling z-scores · not financial advice.
